scripts.build:win-x64: npm run internal:build:lib-win-x64 && rimraf ../build/bin/win-x64/oibus-launcher && npm run build && pkg ./dist/src/index.js --public --compress GZip --config ./package.json --output ../build/bin/win-x64/oibus-launcher --target node26-win-x64
scripts.build:macos-x64: npm run internal:build:lib-macos-x64 && rimraf ../build/bin/macos-x64/oibus-launcher && npm run build && pkg ./dist/src/index.js --public --compress GZip --config ./package.json --output ../build/bin/macos-x64/oibus-launcher --target node26-macos-x64
scripts.build:macos-arm64: npm run internal:build:lib-macos-arm64 && rimraf ../build/bin/macos-arm64/oibus-launcher && npm run build && pkg ./dist/src/index.js --public --compress GZip --config ./package.json --output ../build/bin/macos-arm64/oibus-launcher --target node26-macos-arm64
scripts.build:linux-x64: npm run internal:build:lib-linux-x64 && rimraf ../build/bin/linux-x64/oibus-launcher && npm run build && pkg ./dist/src/index.js --public --compress GZip --config ./package.json --output ../build/bin/linux-x64/oibus-launcher --target node26-linux-x64
scripts.build:linux-arm64: npm run internal:build:lib-linux-arm64 && rimraf ../build/bin/linux-arm64/oibus-launcher && npm run build && pkg ./dist/src/index.js --public --compress GZip --config ./package.json --output ../build/bin/linux-arm64/oibus-launcher --target node26-linux-arm64
scripts.internal:build:lib-win-x64: npm run --prefix node_modules/better-sqlite3 install -- --target=v26.3.0 --arch=x64 --target_platform=win && npm run --prefix node_modules/argon2 install -- --target_platform=win --target_arch=x64
scripts.internal:build:lib-macos-x64: npm run --prefix node_modules/better-sqlite3 install -- --target=v26.3.0 --arch=x64 --target_platform=darwin && npm run --prefix node_modules/argon2 install -- --target_platform=darwin --target_arch=x64
scripts.internal:build:lib-macos-arm64: npm run --prefix node_modules/better-sqlite3 install -- --target=v26.3.0 --arch=arm64 --target_platform=darwin && npm run --prefix node_modules/argon2 install -- --target_arch=arm64 --target_platform=darwin
scripts.internal:build:lib-linux-x64: npm run --prefix node_modules/better-sqlite3 install -- --target=v26.3.0 --arch=x64 --target_platform=linux && npm run --prefix node_modules/argon2 install -- --target_arch=x64 --target_platform=linux
scripts.internal:build:lib-linux-arm64: npm run --prefix node_modules/better-sqlite3 install -- --target=v26.3.0 --arch=arm64 --target_platform=linux && npm run --prefix node_modules/argon2 install -- --target_arch=arm64 --target_platform=linux
